howItWorks.metaDescription: How the Diplomado Apostólico Pastoral works: formal admission with a pastor's letter, $25 monthly subscription, 72 modules over 18 months, 1 module per week, MasterClass by event, personalized feedback from Ap. Max Hebeling and community.
howItWorks.ogTitle: How the DAP works · Diplomado Apostólico Pastoral
howItWorks.ogDescription: $25 monthly subscription. 72 modules over 18 months (1 per week). MasterClass by event, personalized feedback from Ap. Max Hebeling, community.

steps.step1Body: You complete the admission form and, if you don't belong to the Apostolic Network, you attach a consent letter from your pastor. The team reviews it manually and issues your formal admission.
steps.step2Body: $25 USD/month via Stripe — no long-term commitment. Your personal calendar starts the first Tuesday after your admission is approved.
steps.step3Body: Every Tuesday (00:01 San Diego, California time) a new module opens. The activation assignment closes the following Monday (23:59). Past content remains accessible for review indefinitely.
steps.step4Title: You complete blocks, you receive dimensions
steps.step4Body: Once you pass the 8 modules of a block (5 sections completed + quiz passed), you receive a certificate, a badge and a new dimension. 9 blocks = 9 dimensions, from Disciple to Sent One.

week.day1Title: Your module of the week opens
week.day1Body: The new module appears on your dashboard with its 5 parts: introduction, video teaching, practical activation, evaluation and impartation. You receive an automatic email.
week.day2Title: You study at your own pace
week.day2Body: You watch the video teaching (40 min) — from home, the office or wherever you want — take the self-grading quiz and submit your written activation. All at your own pace, within your week.
week.day3Body: After that time, the assignment is marked as pending and the following Tuesday the next week opens. The content you've watched remains available for review.
week.day4Body: Ap. Max Hebeling returns written feedback in his pastoral voice: what you got right, what you need to refine, your next step and a word of impartation. Quiz results are also revealed at 48h.
week.day5Body: Live MasterClass by Ap. Max Hebeling (minimum 1 per month guaranteed). Group mentoring by special call. We notify you by email as soon as it's scheduled.

fiveParts.part1Body: Objective, main revelation and immediate application. You align yourself before the teaching.
fiveParts.part2Body: Main module video (40 min). Doctrine + practice to watch with full focus.
fiveParts.part3Body: Practical exercise to apply right away. Without activation, there is no real impartation.
fiveParts.part4Body: Quiz that measures comprehension. Passing it is required to complete the module.
fiveParts.part5Body: Apostolic closing word. A declaration that remains over your life.

howItWorks.heroBody: Formal admission, monthly subscription, 1 module per week for 72 weeks. Personalized feedback from Ap. Max Hebeling and live MasterClass by event. Time flows — you don't fall behind.
howItWorks.missedWeekTitle: What if I can't complete a week?
howItWorks.missedWeekBodyPre: Nothing happens to your progress. The
howItWorks.missedWeekBodyPost: — the next module opens the following Tuesday. The assignment from the week you didn't submit is marked as pending, but the content remains accessible for review indefinitely. To get certified for the block, you'll need to pass the 8 modules at some point.
howItWorks.missedWeekNote: It removes the anxiety of "losing the month." The calling develops with consistency, not pressure.
howItWorks.ctaBody: $25 USD/month. Cancel anytime. Immediate access to Month 1.

pricing.metaDescription: $25 USD/month — full access to the Diplomado Apostólico Pastoral. 72 modules over 18 months, 1 module per week, personalized feedback from Dr. Max. Cancel anytime.
pricing.ogDescription: $25 USD/month — all included. 72 modules over 18 months, 1 per week, MasterClass by event, community. Cancel anytime.

included.item1Body: Your week's module opens every Tuesday (00:01) and the assignment closes on Monday (23:59). Each module has 5 parts: introduction, teaching, activation, evaluation and impartation.
included.item2Body: Live MasterClass (minimum 1 per month, guaranteed). Group mentoring by the apostle's call. All are recorded and remain available.
included.item3Body: Your activation is graded with feedback in the voice of Dr. Max Hebeling. Results in 48 hours — space to absorb without the anxiety of instant feedback.
included.item4Body: A community of pastors in training and access to the DAP AI Tutor trained on all the program's materials.
included.item5Title: Netflix model: cancel whenever you want
included.item5Body: No long-term commitment. If you pause a month, your progress is saved and you resume from the week where you left off when you reactivate.

notIncluded.item1: One-time enrollment fee or annual fee
notIncluded.item2: Hidden costs for certificate or badge
notIncluded.item4: Charges while the subscription is canceled

pricing.heroBody: Full access to the Diplomado Apostólico Pastoral. 72 modules over 18 months, 1 per week, MasterClass by event and a community of pastors. Cancel anytime, no commitments.
pricing.heroNote: Processed by Stripe · 18 months · 9 blocks · 72 modules
pricing.netflixBody: Cancel from your dashboard whenever you want. While you're active you receive 1 new module each week. If you pause, your progress is saved and when you reactivate you resume from the week where you left off.
pricing.ctaBody: Your subscription activates once payment is confirmed. You start with Phase 1 from day one.

contact.metaDescription: Let's talk. For technical support, pre-sales questions or pastoral inquiries, write to us at contacto@dapglobal.org. We reply within 24 business hours.
contact.ogDescription: Let's talk — support, sales or pastoral inquiries about the Diplomado Apostólico Pastoral.

topics.topic1Body: Questions about the content, the format or whether the DAP is for you? Write to us before paying.
topics.topic2Body: Issues with your charge, cancellation or refund (within 7 days).
topics.topic3Body: You can't log in, a module won't load, a quiz fails. We'll help you solve it.
topics.topic4Body: If you want to talk about your calling, a church interested in joining, or collaborations.

contact.heroBody: For any inquiry, support or pastoral conversation, write to us. We reply within 24 business hours.
contact.topicsEyebrow: What you can write to us about
contact.faqBody: We answer most questions in the FAQ section of the landing page.
contact.ctaBody: You don't need to write to us first. Subscribe, try the first 7 days — if it's not for you, we'll refund everything.

demo.metaDescription: Try a full week of the DAP without paying. Video, activation, evaluation and impartation — the same experience a subscribed student receives, for free.
demo.ogDescription: A full week of the Diplomado Apostólico Pastoral. Video + activation + quiz + impartation.
demo.heroBody: This is exactly the experience a subscribed student receives. Video, activation, evaluation and impartation — a complete program module, accessible without logging in.
demo.introObjectiveBody: To recognize the Kingdom of God not as a future or distant idea, but as a present reality operating here and now — and to discover how it manifests in your daily life.
demo.introRevelationBody: The Kingdom is not just a theological concept. It is tangible government. Where the King arrives, the Kingdom arrives, and where the Kingdom arrives, everything changes: your home, your ministry, your community.
demo.introApplicationBody: You'll learn to recognize the areas of your life where the Kingdom is not yet manifesting, and you'll receive concrete tools to exercise authority over them.
demo.introVerse: "But seek first the kingdom of God and his righteousness, and all these things will be added to you." — Matthew 6:33
demo.teachingCardTitle: Kingdom of God — The present reality
demo.teachingProductionBody: Subscribe to the program and receive the full video plus the other 71 modules. Video demo available when enrollment opens.
demo.teachingDescription: In this video, Ap. Max Hebeling develops the concept of the Kingdom doctrinally, citing the key gospel passages where Jesus describes it, and bringing it down to practical application for pastors who are building ministries today.
demo.activationIntroPre: Every DAP module includes a written activation that
demo.activationIntroPost: and returns to you with structured feedback within 48 hours:
demo.activationBullet1: What he saw done well in your submission
demo.activationBullet4: An apostolic word of impartation over your calling
demo.activationConsignaPre: Identify 3 concrete areas of your life (family, ministry, finances, health, relationships) where the Kingdom of God
demo.activationConsignaPost: . For each area, write a faith declaration based on Scripture about what you want to see transformed this week, and a concrete step you'll take to align that area with the Kingdom.
demo.activationLockPre: To submit your activation and receive Dr. Max's feedback,
demo.evaluationBodyPre: Every module closes with a short evaluation. You need
demo.evaluationBodyPost: to pass it. Try it below — this demo version shows you the correct answer instantly.
demo.impartationBody: Son, rise up and recognize that the Kingdom of God is not a place you go to someday. It is the Father's government operating here, over your life, now. Where you stand, there is authority. Where you declare, there is effect. This week, you will see things move that had been stuck for years — because you will no longer look at them as an orphan son but as a son of the King.
demo.impartationVerse: "Behold, I establish my covenant with you... and I will bless those who bless you." — Genesis 17 / Luke 17:21
demo.ctaBody: 71 more modules, personal feedback from Dr. Max on each one, monthly live MasterClass, apostolic group mentoring and a private community of pastors. For $25 USD a month.
demo.ctaNote: No commitment · Cancel whenever you want · 7-day guarantee

ranks.metaDescription: Disciple, Son, Leader, Minister, Administrator, Steward, Reformer, Architect, Sent One. Each DAP block grants a new verifiable dimension.
ranks.ogTitle: The 9 Dimensions of the Kingdom · DAP
ranks.ogDescription: Disciple, Son, Leader, Minister, Administrator, Steward, Reformer, Architect, Sent One — the complete apostolic journey.
ranks.loadError: The dimensions could not be loaded: {message}
ranks.heroBody: Each completed block grants a verifiable ministry dimension. They are not honorary titles: they are stages of process recognized within the apostolic government of the DAP.
ranks.ctaBody: Week 1 places you on the path to the Disciple dimension. After passing the 8 modules of Block 1, you receive it.

rankDetail.metaDescriptionWithTheme: Dimension {name} — granted upon completing Block {order} ({theme}) of the Diplomado Apostólico Pastoral.
rankDetail.metaDescription: Dimension {name} of the Diplomado Apostólico Pastoral.

phases.loadError: The phase could not be loaded: {message}
phases.whatYouLearnHeading: The key objectives of this phase.
phases.whatYouLearnBody: The details of the learning objectives, key words of the phase and expected deliverables are edited from the admin panel. Each phase will have its complete curricular description here before the public launch.
phases.modulesHeadingSingular: {count} class of 40 min on video each.
phases.modulesHeadingPlural: {count} classes of 40 min on video each.
phases.noModules: this phase doesn't have published modules yet.
phases.ctaBody: $25 USD/month. Access to recorded content, live sessions and group mentoring. Cancel anytime.

verify.metaDescription: Official verification of a certificate issued by the Diplomado Apostólico Pastoral.
verify.pdfNotAvailable: The PDF is not yet available for this certificate.
verify.footerNote: This certificate was issued by the Diplomado Apostólico Pastoral. To report a suspected forgery, contact the team.
verify.errorBodyPre: We couldn't find any certificate with the code
verify.errorBodyPost: . Check that the code is written correctly. Codes have 8 hexadecimal characters in uppercase.

privacy.metaDescription: Privacy policy of the Diplomado Apostólico Pastoral (DAP). How we collect, use and protect your personal data.
privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.introPost: (hereinafter, "we"), we respect your privacy and are committed to protecting the personal data you share with us. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, with whom we share it and what rights you have over it.
privacy.s1Body: Revival & Kingdom Ministries, INC, an entity incorporated in California, United States, is the controller of the personal data collected through
privacy.s2aItem1: Full name, email and password (when creating the account).
privacy.s2aItem5: Payment data: processed directly by Stripe; we do not store card numbers.
privacy.s2aItem6: Content you generate within the Service (community posts, messages to the AI tutor, answers to evaluations).
privacy.s2bItem1: IP address, browser type, device and operating system.
privacy.s2bItem2: Pages visited, time spent and modules consumed (usage analytics).
privacy.s2bItem3: Academic progress (modules completed, evaluations passed, dimensions obtained).
privacy.s3Item1Body: manage your account, track your academic progress, grant you certificates and dimensions.
privacy.s3Item2Body: recurring billing and cancellations through Stripe.
privacy.s3Item3Body: sending transactional emails (welcome, payment confirmations, cancellation notices, weekly openings, assignment feedback).
privacy.s3Item4Body: reminders of live sessions, program news.
privacy.s3Item5Body: respond to your inquiries and resolve issues.
privacy.s3Item6Body: aggregate analytics to optimize content and experience.
privacy.s3Item7Body: prevent fraud, abuse or unauthorized use of accounts.
privacy.s3Item8Body: when a competent authority requires it.
privacy.s4Intro: We do not sell your personal data. We share it only with the following providers that help us operate the Service under confidentiality and data protection agreements:
privacy.s4Item4Body: — audio and video hosting and playback.
privacy.s4Item6Body: — artificial intelligence model of the tutor (queries are processed without being associated with your public identity).
privacy.s4Outro: Each provider operates under its own privacy policies and complies with international standards (GDPR, CCPA, SOC 2 where applicable).
privacy.s5Intro: We use cookies and equivalent technologies to:
privacy.s5Item1Body: keep your session logged in and protect against CSRF.
privacy.s5Outro: You can configure your browser to reject cookies, although that may affect the functionality of the Service (especially login).
privacy.s6Intro: Your data is stored in infrastructure managed by Supabase (Postgres, AWS us-west-2). We apply:
privacy.s6Item1: Encryption in transit (TLS 1.2+) and at rest (AES-256).
privacy.s6Item2: Row Level Security (RLS) in the database.
privacy.s6Item3: Hashed passwords (we do not store passwords in plain text).
privacy.s6Item4: Internal access restricted to authorized personnel.
privacy.s6Outro: Despite the measures implemented, no system is 100% secure. In the event of an incident that compromises personal data, we will notify you without undue delay by email.
privacy.s7Item1Body: while your account is open and for up to 12 additional months after the last access.
privacy.s7Item2Body: retained according to applicable tax and accounting obligations (minimum 7 years in the U.S.).
privacy.s7Item3Body: we delete your data within a maximum of 30 days, except for data we are required to retain by law.
privacy.s8Intro: You may exercise the following rights over your personal data at any time:
privacy.s8Item1Body: obtain a copy of the data we hold about you.
privacy.s8Item3Body: request the erasure of your data ("right to be forgotten").
privacy.s8Item4Body: receive your data in a structured, readable format.
privacy.s8Item5Body: object to the processing of your data for marketing purposes.
privacy.s8OutroPre: To exercise any of these rights, write to us at
privacy.s8OutroPost: from the email address associated with your account. We will respond within a maximum of 30 days.
privacy.s9Body: Since some of our providers have infrastructure in the United States and other regions, your data may be transferred outside your country of residence. We ensure that such transfers comply with the appropriate safeguards (standard contractual clauses, international certifications).
privacy.s10Body: The Service is intended for people over 18 years of age. We do not knowingly collect data from minors under 13. If we become aware that we have collected data from a minor without verifiable parental consent, we will delete it immediately.
privacy.s11Body: We may update this policy. We will notify you of material changes by email at least 15 days in advance. The date of the last update appears at the beginning of this document.
privacy.s12Intro: For inquiries, exercise of rights or complaints related to your personal data:
privacy.copyright: © {year} Revival & Kingdom Ministries, INC. All rights reserved.

terms.metaDescription: Terms and conditions of use of the Diplomado Apostólico Pastoral (DAP), operated by Revival & Kingdom Ministries, INC.
terms.title: Terms and conditions
terms.introPre: Welcome to the Diplomado Apostólico Pastoral (hereinafter,
terms.introMid: ). These terms govern your access and use of the website
terms.introPost: and of any related product, content or service.
terms.operatedMid: , an entity incorporated under the laws of the State of California, United States of America (hereinafter,
terms.accept: By creating an account, subscribing or using the Service, you accept these Terms in their entirety. If you do not agree, do not use the Service.
terms.s1Body1: The DAP is an online educational program of comprehensive apostolic training lasting 18 months, organized into 9 thematic blocks (72 modules in total, 1 module per week). It includes pre-recorded classes, live sessions by event (MasterClass + mentoring), personalized feedback on written assignments in the voice of Dr. Max Hebeling (48h after submission), a community of pastors and access to an artificial intelligence tutor trained on the program's material.
terms.s1Body2Pre: Entry into the program requires a
terms.s1Body2Post: : the applicant completes a form and, if they do not belong to the Apostolic Network Reino y Avivamiento or to Revival & Kingdom Ministries, INC, they must attach a consent letter signed by their pastor. Admission is reviewed and approved manually by the admissions team.
terms.s1Body3Pre: Once admission is approved, content is released by
terms.s1Body3Post: : the week's module opens every Tuesday (00:01 San Diego, California time) and the assignment closes the following Monday (23:59). Past content remains available for review indefinitely.
terms.s2Body: To access the Service you must create an account by providing truthful, up-to-date and complete information. You are responsible for the confidentiality of your password and for all activity that occurs under your account.
terms.s2Item1: You must be over 18 years of age (or have verifiable parental consent if you are between 13 and 17 years old).
terms.s2Item2: An account corresponds to a single individual. Shared use is not allowed.
terms.s2Item3Pre: Immediately report any unauthorized use to
terms.s3BodyPre: Access to the DAP requires a monthly subscription of
terms.s3BodyPost: processed by Stripe, Inc. The subscription renews automatically each month on the anniversary date of enrollment until the user cancels it.
terms.s31Body: The subscription operates under a Netflix model: the monthly charge continues while the subscription is active, regardless of the user's academic progress. The weekly calendar rules — the user receives 1 new module per week as long as the subscription is current. If the user does not complete a week's assignment, there is no charge penalty: the assignment is simply marked as pending and the content remains accessible for review.
terms.s32Body: You can cancel the subscription at any time from the "My subscription" section of your account or from the Stripe portal. Cancellation stops future charges but allows you to keep accessing the content until the end of the monthly period already paid. Your academic progress is preserved: if you reactivate later, you resume from the week where you left off.
terms.s4Body1Post: counted from the date of the first charge. If you are not satisfied with the Service, you can request a full refund of your first payment within that period by writing to
terms.s4Body2: Once the 7 days have passed, or for monthly charges after the first one, no partial or total refunds are granted. The user keeps access to the content until the end of the paid monthly period.
terms.s5Body1: All DAP content (videos, texts, live broadcasts, PDFs, evaluations, brand, logos, design, code and downloadable materials) is the exclusive property of Revival & Kingdom Ministries, INC or its licensors, and is protected by United States and international intellectual property laws.
terms.s5Body2: The user is granted a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable and revocable license to access the content solely for personal training purposes while the subscription is active.
terms.s5Item1: Reproduce, distribute, retransmit, sell, license or commercially exploit any part of the content.
terms.s5Item2: Record, download (except materials identified as downloadable) or redistribute the live sessions.
terms.s5Item3: Create derivative works from the DAP content.
terms.s5Item4: Share access credentials with third parties.
terms.s6Body: The certificates and dimensions granted upon completing DAP blocks (Disciple, Son, Leader, Minister, Administrator, Steward, Reformer, Architect, Sent One) are issued by Revival & Kingdom Ministries, INC and recognized within its ministry network. They do not constitute university academic degrees or degrees with official state validity.
terms.s7Intro: In using the Service you agree to:
terms.s7Item1: Not violate applicable laws or the rights of third parties.
terms.s7Item2: Not use the Service to spread offensive, discriminatory, illegal or defamatory content.
terms.s7Item3: Not attempt to access restricted areas, manipulate the system, bypass academic gating or pirate modules.
terms.s7Item4: Respect the other members of the community.
terms.s7Outro: Non-compliance may result in the suspension or cancellation of your account without a refund.
terms.s8Body1: The Service is provided "as is" and "as available." To the maximum extent permitted by law, Revival & Kingdom Ministries, INC will not be liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential or punitive damages arising from the use or inability to use the Service.
terms.s8Body2: The Company's total aggregate liability will not exceed the total amount paid by the user in the 12 months prior to the event giving rise to the claim.
terms.s9Body: We may update these Terms at any time. We will notify active users of material changes by email at least 15 days before they take effect. Continued use of the Service after they take effect implies acceptance of the new Terms.
terms.s10Body: We may suspend or terminate your account, with or without prior notice, in the event of a breach of these Terms or if we determine, at our reasonable discretion, that your use of the Service is harmful to other users or to the Company.
terms.s11Body1: These Terms are governed by the laws of the State of California, United States of America, without regard to its conflict of laws.
terms.s11Body2: Any dispute arising from these Terms or from the use of the Service will be submitted to the exclusive jurisdiction of the state and federal courts located in the State of California, U.S.A.
terms.s12BodyPre: For any inquiry about these Terms you can write to us at
terms.copyright: © {year} Revival & Kingdom Ministries, INC. All rights reserved.

refund.metaDescription: 7-day money-back guarantee at the Diplomado Apostólico Pastoral. Monthly subscription model with free cancellation.
refund.title: Refund policy
refund.introPre: We want you to enter the Diplomado Apostólico Pastoral
refund.introPost: with confidence and without financial risk. This policy explains when and how you can request your money back.
refund.s1Strong: You have 7 calendar days from your first charge to request a full refund
refund.s1BodyMid: , with no need to justify the reason. If within that period you feel the DAP is not for you, we refund 100% of the
refund.s2Item1Post: from the same address with which you created your account.
refund.s2Item3: Include: full name and date of the charge (or the last 4 of the card).
refund.s2OutroPre: We process the refund within a maximum of
refund.s2OutroPost: from receipt of the request. The credit appears on your card or payment method between 5 and 10 additional business days, depending on your issuing bank's timelines.
refund.s3Pre: Once the guarantee window has passed,
refund.s3Strong: we do not grant partial or total refunds for months already charged
refund.s3Item1: Subscriptions canceled mid-month (you keep access until the end of the paid period).
refund.s3Item2: Forgetting to cancel before the recurring charge.
refund.s3Item3: Lack of personal time or motivation to complete the month's content.
refund.s3Outro: The DAP model is Netflix-style: you cancel whenever you want, you stop paying the next month, but the month already charged is honored.
refund.s4Heading: 4. Netflix model — no penalties for not advancing
refund.s4Body1: The subscription operates under a Netflix model: the monthly charge continues while the subscription is active, regardless of academic progress. If you didn't complete the assignment one week, there is no penalty — it is simply marked as pending and the content remains accessible. To get certified for the block, you'll need to pass the 8 modules at some point, but you can do it at your own pace.
refund.s4Body2Pre: If at any point you decide not to continue, you simply cancel the subscription from your dashboard and stop paying from the following month.
refund.s4Body2Post: Your progress is saved: if you reactivate, you resume from the week where you left off.
refund.s51Body: If you receive a charge that does not correspond, write to us immediately and we will reverse it at no cost. The 7-day period does not apply in these cases.
refund.s52Body: If someone used your card without authorization to subscribe to the DAP, let us know as soon as you detect it so we can investigate and refund the charge.
refund.s53Pre: If we suspend or cancel your account for violating the
refund.s53Post: , no refunds are granted for periods already charged.
refund.s6Body: Refunds are processed through Stripe, Inc. to the same original payment method. We do not issue refunds in cash, alternative bank transfers, cryptocurrencies or to cards other than the original.
refund.s7Intro: For requests or inquiries about refunds:
refund.footerPre: This policy is part of our
refund.footerPost: . In case of discrepancy between this document and the Terms, the Terms prevail.
